headline: Biogen to Share New SMA Data at Muscular Dystrophy Association and SMA Europe Conferences
summary: Long-term data from DEVOTE/ONWARD studies show benefits of high dose nusinersen in people living with spinal muscular atrophy (SMA)New Phase 1b data further illustrate potential of salanersen in SMA, as Phase 3 studies begin to evaluate this investigational drug that has the potential for high potency with once-yearly dosing CAMBRIDGE, Mass., March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) – will present new data and updates from its spinal muscle atrophy (SMA) research programs, i

headline: What Makes Biogen (BIIB) an Attractive Long-Term Holding?
summary: Patient Capital Management, a value investing firm, released its “Patient Opportunity Equity Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In Q4 2025, Patient Opportunity Equity Strategy returned 5.99% net of fees, compared to its unmanaged benchmark, the S&P 500 Index, which returned 2.65%.
